SHADOWFALL-BIG_BAG_OF_SNAKES.title: Big Bag of Snakes
SHADOWFALL-BIG_BAG_OF_SNAKES.description:
At the start of odd turns, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Soul Roll[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
At the start of even turns, draw an additional card and [gold]Muddle[/gold] it.
SHADOWFALL-BIG_BAG_OF_SNAKES.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
